_instructions: Place your sound files in this directory (public/sounds/).
Each entry below maps a UI event to a sound file name.
Supported formats: mp3, ogg, wav, webm.
You can override individual sounds by placing a file with the exact name listed below.
Use the in-app Sound Settings menu (🔊) to upload and preview sounds directly in the browser.
The in-app upload stores sounds in your browser (IndexedDB) and takes priority over these files.
Use 'Download Pack' in the Sound Settings menu to export your uploaded sounds as a JSON bundle.
